title: xylosteon ciliatum
intro: Xylosteon ciliatum, also known as the hop hornbeam or hop tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Xylosteon ciliatum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used to make a decoction.
